primary.description: Deep Royal Navy - Trust, Authority, Corporate

usage.hero_section: Dark Navy Background or Image Overlay
usage.stats_section: Dark Navy Background with Gold Accents

hero_slider.style: Full-screen height (min-h-[80vh]), text overlay with fade-up animation

stats_showcase.style: Grid layout (4 columns), large numbers in Playfair Display, Gold color for numbers, White for labels

owner_profile.style: Asymmetric Layout (Image Left/Right, Text Opposite). High-end editorial look.
owner_profile.image_style: Grayscale or Desaturated with subtle gold border/accent

success_stories.style: Masonry or Grid of Cards. Minimalist. Image top, Title, Category Tag.
success_stories.hover_effect: Scale up image slightly, show 'Read Case Study' arrow

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Ensure Tailwind config includes 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' as defined.
2. HEADER: Create a transparent sticky header that becomes solid white on scroll. Use the Logo provided.
3. HERO: Implement the Carousel component with the provided hero images. Add a dark overlay for text readability.
4. STATS: Create a dedicated section using the 'stats' background image with a heavy dark blue overlay (90% opacity) so the abstract lines are subtle.
5. OWNER: Build the 'Wiljadi Tan' style profile section. Use the owner image provided. Make it look premium (editorial style).
6. LANGUAGE: Add a language switcher in the Navbar (EN | AR | CN | ES). Just the UI selector for now.
7. FOOTER: Large, dark footer with 4 columns. Include 'Jakarta' address placeholder.
8. ANIMATIONS: Use 'framer-motion' for simple fade-ups on text. Do not over-animate.
9. FORMS: Use shadcn Form component for the Contact section.
10. MOBILE: Ensure the Hero slider text is readable on mobile (adjust font size).
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic 'SaaS Blue'. Use the custom Navy (#0B1C3E).
Use Playfair Display for ALL Headings (h1, h2, h3).
Use Manrope for ALL Body text.
Do not use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Keep borders sharp or slightly rounded (rounded-sm) for a corporate feel.
Ensure high contrast between text and background images.
